exclusion_rules.description: Only individuals aged 18 to 70 years are eligible
Must have an active savings bank account. Jan Dhan accounts are also eligible.
If an individual has multiple savings accounts across banks, they can enroll through only ONE bank account
Policy lapses if Rs 20 annual premium is not auto-debited from the linked bank account by June 1 of each year

family_criteria.family_definition: Individual scheme — each person must enroll separately with their own bank account. Not a family floater. Multiple family members can each enroll independently.

covered_procedures: Accidental death: Rs 2 lakh lump sum to nominee
Total permanent disability (both eyes, both hands, both feet, or one eye + one hand/foot): Rs 2 lakh
Partial permanent disability (one eye, one hand, or one foot): Rs 1 lakh
excluded_procedures: Death or disability due to alcohol or drug influence
Death or disability from war, nuclear hazard, or insurrection
Medical treatment expenses (this is NOT a health insurance scheme)

required_documents.name: Savings Bank Account
required_documents.notes: Active savings account in any scheduled commercial bank, RRB, or cooperative bank. Jan Dhan accounts qualify.

required_documents.name: Aadhaar Card
required_documents.notes: Must be linked to the bank account for auto-debit consent

required_documents.name: Nomination Form
required_documents.notes: Must nominate a beneficiary who will receive the claim amount. Available at bank branch.

required_documents.name: Auto-Debit Consent
required_documents.notes: Written consent for Rs 20/year to be auto-debited from bank account between May 25 and June 1 annually

enrollment_channels: Any bank branch (SBI, PNB, BOB, etc.)
Net banking portal of your bank
Mobile banking app of your bank
Bank Mitra / Business Correspondent in villages
enrollment_steps: Step 1: Visit your bank branch (or use net banking / mobile banking app)
Step 2: Ask for the PMSBY enrollment form or select PMSBY option in digital banking
Step 3: Fill the form with personal details, bank account number, and nominee details
Step 4: Provide Aadhaar number for KYC linkage
Step 5: Sign the auto-debit consent for Rs 20/year premium
Step 6: Bank processes the enrollment and Rs 20 is debited from your account
Step 7: Policy certificate is generated; coverage begins from June 1 of the enrollment year
Step 8: Policy auto-renews annually if sufficient balance (Rs 20) is maintained in the account
description_for_embedding: Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana (PMSBY) is a central government ACCIDENT INSURANCE scheme — NOT a health insurance scheme. It provides Rs 2 lakh for accidental death or total permanent disability and Rs 1 lakh for partial permanent disability at an annual premium of just Rs 20, auto-debited from the bank account. Eligibility: any individual aged 18-70 with a savings bank account. It does NOT cover hospitalization, medical treatment, or natural death. This is a personal accident cover. Enrollment through any bank branch, net banking, or mobile banking. Important: this complements health schemes like PM-JAY but does not replace them.
